entries.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
entries.description: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.

entries.title: Notion restores access to Anthropic after service disruption
entries.description: Notion's head of product said he was "astonished" at “the amount of people RT-ing this."

entries.title: OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’
entries.description: "Chat is dead" — at least, according to a senior OpenAI employee.

entries.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
entries.description: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.

entries.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
entries.description: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.

entries.title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
entries.description: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."

entries.title: Following Anthropic, OpenAI files confidentially for IPO
entries.description: The filing comes a little more than a week after its main rival, Anthropic, also filed to go public, ramping up the race between the two AI firms.

entries.title: Apple plays catch-up at WWDC
entries.description: Apple spent much of its WWDC keynote highlighting fixes, performance improvements, and long-requested features before unveiling its upgraded AI-powered Siri, signaling that the company wants users to

entries.title: Apple bets cheaper AI will woo small developers
entries.description: As AI experimentation grows more expensive, Apple is waiving cloud API costs for developers with fewer than 2 million first-time App Store downloads.

entries.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more
entries.description: Apple primarily made the case for an improved experience with its longstanding Siri assistant, which like most other announcements had a hefty helping of AI.

entries.title: Apple just taught your iPhone to finish your sentences, your photos, and your workflows
entries.description: Apple is adding new AI-powered features to Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps.

entries.title: Apple will let you build workflows using AI in its new Shortcuts app
entries.description: Shortcuts gets an AI upgrade, letting you describe the workflow you want in a prompt.

entries.title: Apple’s Image Playground doesn’t suck anymore
entries.description: Apple's AI image generator is getting a makeover that could make it more competitive.

entries.title: Apple’s Photos app is getting new AI editing features
entries.description: A new spatial "Reframe" feature will let users use AI to adjust perspectives.

entries.title: Apple gives Siri its own dedicated app
entries.description: Siri is finally getting its own app.

entries.title: Apple is fixing the headache of splitting the bill with its new Siri in Camera feature
entries.description: "If you're grabbing a bite with friends and point your iPhone at the bill, then [you can] select what you ordered to split the tab with Apple Cash," said Apple VP of Software Sebastien Marineau-Mes.

entries.title: Apple’s long-awaited AI Siri overhaul is finally here
entries.description: The idea behind the new "Siri AI" is to turn the assistant from a voice controlled assistant into an AI companion that can do a lot more.

entries.title: Amazon now lets you design custom merch using AI
entries.description: A new feature in the Amazon Shopping app allows users to generate designs with Alexa, then print them on products like T-shirts, hoodies, and tumblers.

entries.title: WWDC 2026: What to expect, from Siri’s highly anticipated revamp to Apple Intelligence and iOS 27
entries.description: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.
